description: You are a wholesale sales representative setting up a new product line in SuiteCRM's product catalog. Create a Product Category named 'Industrial Sensors' with the description 'Sensors for industrial monitoring and automation'. Additionally, create and link two products to this category: 'TempSense Pro X200' (Part Number: TSP-X200, Price: 345.00 USD, Cost: 172.50 USD, Description: 'High-accuracy industrial temperature sensor with digital output') and 'PressureGuard M500' (Part Number: PGM-500, Price: 189.50 USD, Cost: 94.75 USD, Description: 'Pressure monitoring sensor for pipeline and vessel applications').
